facts: NIT Manipur (National Institute of Technology Manipur) is located at Langol, Imphal-795004, Manipur.
Email: nitmanipur@yahoo.in. Website: www.nitmanipur.ac.in.
Languages spoken: Official language is Meitei (Manipuri/Meiteilon). Most people also speak Hindi.
Climate: Moderate, subtropical monsoonal.
Imphal Airport is 9.1 km from NIT Manipur campus.
Dimapur Railway Station is 200-205 km from NIT Manipur campus.
Bus from Dimapur to Imphal costs Rs 700.
Train route: Vivek Dibrugarh Express from Rajahmundry to Dimapur, then winger or bus to Imphal.
NIT Manipur has 5 boys hostels.
H01 - inside campus, for 3rd and 4th year students.
H02 - inside campus, for 3rd and 4th year students.
H03 - inside campus, for 2nd year students.
NIT Manipur Private Boys Hostel 05 - 1.5 km from campus, for 1st year students.
PhD Hostel H04 - 1 km from campus, for MTech and PhD students.
Room types: Big room (5 students per room) and Small room (3 students per room).
1st year boys are in Hostel 05 (off-campus). 2nd years in H03. 3rd and 4th years in H01 and H02.
NIT Manipur has 2 girls hostels.
NIT Manipur Takyel Girls Hostel - for 1st and 2nd year girls, 4-6 km from airport, 3 km from bus stand.
NIT Manipur Girls Hostel near campus - walking distance from campus, for 3rd and 4th year girls.

mess.assignment: H02 and H03 share the same mess. H01 has a separate mess. Hostel 05 (1st years) has a separate mess. PhD hostel has a separate mess. All hostels follow the same menu.
mess.timings: Breakfast 7 AM - 9 AM, Lunch 12 PM - 2 PM, Snacks 5 PM - 6 PM, Dinner 7 PM - 9 PM

monday.lunch: Rice, Roti, Bengan, Dal, Uti, Ametpa

wednesday.lunch: Rice, Roti, Dal, Sambar, Giya Papad

thursday.lunch: Rice, Roti, Aloo Soyabean, Ironba, Pickle

friday.lunch: Rice, Roti, Dal, Aloo Gobi, Salad

saturday.lunch: Rice, Roti, Dal, Squash Uti, Ametpa
saturday.dinner: Rice, Roti, Dal, Egg Curry/Aloo Peanut

mess.notes: Menu includes local Manipuri items such as Ironba, Ametpa, and Uti. Chicken is served on Sunday and Wednesday. Fish is served on Monday. Egg is served on Thursday and Saturday.
mess.cuisine: Mix of North Indian staples (roti, dal, rice) with local Manipuri dishes (Ironba, Ametpa, Uti) and some Chinese-influenced items (chowmein, fried rice). Non-veg options include chicken, fish, and egg on specific days.

waivers.SC_ST_scholarship: Tuition fee borne by Ministry of Tribal/Social Development

facts: Both hostel and college WiFi are available at NIT Manipur.
Airtel and Jio 5G networks have good coverage.
75% attendance is required to appear in end semester exams at NIT Manipur.
No large cultural events at NIT Manipur.
Small events: Flash mob, Regen Hackathon.
Major events: Freshers and Farewell.
Washing machine available only in H01 hostel at Rs 50 per kg.
Outside washing businesses available.
Most students wash their own clothes.
No student elections at NIT Manipur.
Cricket, Volleyball, Chess, Kho-Kho, and Badminton are available.
Inter-NIT sports competitions are held.
One sports meet per year.
One canteen inside the hostel.
3 small restaurants near campus belonging to NIT Manipur, open 9 AM - 7 PM.
One stationery shop near campus, located beside the 3 restaurants.
Rs 2,000 late fine for coming late after holidays.
Rs 5,000 to Rs 10,000 for indisciplinary actions.
No gym facility in NIT Manipur college.
Nearest private gym is 5 km from campus.
No free medicines available at NIT Manipur.
Nearby hospitals: Shija Hospitals (SHRI) at 10.8 km, RIMS at 5.5 km.

nearby: Many small local restaurants near campus

facts: Official language is Meitei (Manipuri/Meiteilon). Most people also speak Hindi.
Moderate, subtropical monsoonal climate.

subjects: CS2401 Formal Languages and Automata Theory (FLAT)

academics.class_timings: 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday
